scores.notes: Code is correct and complete. Uses self.on.my_service_relation_joined (underscore form) instead of the preferred self.on['my-service'].relation_joined (bracket form), hence slight deduction on idiomatic. Also adds unnecessary complexity with relation_changed handler and config_changed re-publishing, but these are valid patterns not errors. All imports at module level, correct databag usage with self.unit, correct socket.getfqdn() usage.
